chunks.text: we wrote a short essay about what kind of job we want to have when we grow up.
I wrote that I want to be a writer who moves people 's hearts with the power of words.
Tom said, “ I want to be a bus driver.
I will be happy if I can take many people to safe places.
My sister said with a smile
“ I want to be a farmer and grow delicious vegetables.
One classmate wants to be a police officer.
Another one wants to be a cook and make many people smile with his food.
“ I want to be a scientist who studies the mystery of space.
Or, maybe an engineer who designs bridges and big buildings.
